golden_cases.name: Materials Science -> biology
golden_cases.description: Crack propagation in composite ceramics under variable thermal stress.

golden_cases.name: Biotech -> Engineering
golden_cases.description: Optimizing nutrient uptake in a bioreactor with non-Newtonian fluid dynamics.

golden_cases.name: Economics -> Ecology
golden_cases.description: Modeling market volatility using stochastic differential equations during a liquidity crisis.

stress_cases.name: The Impossible Mix
stress_cases.description: Analyzing the quantum entanglement of social media sentiment clusters in a 5D manifold with relativistic constraints.
stress_cases.reasoning: Checks if the Extractor hallucinates math that doesn't exist or handles nonsense gracefully.

stress_cases.name: Extreme Constraint Density
stress_cases.description: Solve for the equilibrium of 500 mutually exclusive agent constraints in a zero-sum resource allocation problem where the budget is a moving target influenced by lunar cycles.
stress_cases.reasoning: Tests the Scorer's ability to map a high volume of constraints without losing focus.

stress_cases.name: Vague/Poetic Input
stress_cases.description: The way the light dances on the water reminds me of how my data looks when it's broken.
stress_cases.reasoning: Tests the Validator and Extractor's ability to reject non-scientific/non-mathematical input.
